item.title: WordCamp India 2027 Announced as Fourth Flagship Event
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

WordCamp India 2027 will become the fourth WordPress flagship event — joining Europe, US, and Asia. Announced by Chenda Ngak at the closing of WordCamp Asia 2026 in Mumbai.

item.title: WordCamp Asia 2026 – Recap from Mumbai
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

WordCamp Asia 2026 brought together 2,281 WordPress enthusiasts in Mumbai — one of the biggest WordPress gatherings ever in Asia!

Hundreds of volunteers spent a full day improving WordPress together: fixing bugs, translating WordPress into more languages, and welcoming new contributors to the community.

The highlight: a look ahead at WordPress 7.0 and exciting new features coming soon — including better tools for working together on your website in real time.

item.title: WordPress & AI: The Defining Theme of WCAsia 2026
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

At WordCamp Asia 2026 in Mumbai, one topic dominated every conversation: AI.

Talks and sessions explored how artificial intelligence is starting to change the way WordPress websites are built and managed — making things faster and smarter for everyone, from beginners to experts.

The big takeaway: AI isn't replacing WordPress — it's becoming a powerful tool that helps WordPress do even more.

item.title: WordPress 7.0 Release Candidate 2
item.description:
WordPress 7.0 RC2 is here!

The second Release Candidate for WordPress 7.0 is ready for testing and evaluation.

  • New Features Preview: Experience the upcoming features planned for the final release.
  • Testing Recommendations: Do not use this version on production sites; evaluate it on a test server.

item.title: my.WordPress.net – WordPress in Your Browser
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

…there is now my.WordPress.net – a full WordPress that runs entirely in your browser?

No sign-up, no hosting, no domain. Just open it and start. Built on WordPress Playground, all data stays local – nothing is uploaded, nothing is publicly accessible.

It comes with ready-made apps like a Personal CRM, a private RSS Reader, and an AI Workspace that can even create custom plugins.

item.title: New AI Agent Skill for WordPress
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

…AI is now helping developers build better WordPress plugins and themes — faster and more reliably than ever before?

A new tool lets AI automatically test plugins and themes before they are released. This means fewer bugs reach your website, and updates become safer for everyone.

Thanks to AI, what used to take developers minutes now happens in seconds — so the tools you rely on keep getting better, faster.

item.title: Learn WordPress for Designers
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

…Learn WordPress has a dedicated learning path especially for designers?

It gently guides you through blocks, patterns, and the Site Editor, helping you turn creative ideas into real WordPress websites step by step.

item.title: WordPress and the future of AI
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

…artificial intelligence is becoming a big part of WordPress's future?

The people behind WordPress are working on making AI tools work seamlessly with your website — think smart writing helpers, automatic translations, or suggestions that make managing your site easier.

The goal: AI that helps you, works reliably, and respects your data.

item.title: WordPress isn’t just software
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

…there are large WordPress events around the world where enthusiasts meet and learn from each other?

Conferences like WordCamp Europe, WordCamp US, and WordCamp Asia bring the global WordPress community together in person.

These events feature talks, workshops, and networking opportunities for everyone from beginners to seasoned developers.

item.title: WordPress powers the open web
item.description:
Did you know… 🤓

…WordPress now powers more than 43% of all websites worldwide, making it the most widely used content management system on the internet?

This scale is the result of nearly two decades of open-source development and a global community continuously improving the platform.
